title: AAS DPP4.0 Shell Binding
description: Binding contract between a Digital Product Passport and its AAS Shell representation. Specifies how passportId maps to AAS shell id, how submodels are referenced, and which AAS shell properties are mandatory for a DPP4.0-compliant shell.

shellId.description: AAS Shell id — must be the base64url-encoded passportId per DPP4.0 identification scheme

globalAssetId.description: Asset identifier of the physical product (subjectId from passport-subject)

semanticId.description: Semantic ID URI of the submodel type

accessClass.description: Access class controlling this submodel's visibility

submodelRefs.description: Submodels registered for this DPP shell

endpointHref.description: HTTPS endpoint where this shell can be accessed via AAS Part 2 APIs

registryId.description: AAS Registry instance where this shell is registered
